PowerShell($botId = "cmq8i3lj9000611gt73q7nq0r"; $fake = @{ update_id = 1; my_chat_member = @{ chat = @{ id = -1009999999; title = "Teste Canal"; type = "channel" }; new_chat_member = @{ status = "administrator" } } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3002/webhook/$botId" -Method POST -Body $fake -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ERRO HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
